Name: XLOOKUP
Description: Looks up a key in one range and returns the matching value from another range.
RiskMgmtExample: Find the approved limit for a dummy portfolio key before comparing exposure.
Excel2021Alternative: Excel 2021 supports XLOOKUP. INDEX/MATCH is also acceptable when workbook compatibility is uncertain.

Name: XMATCH
Description: Returns the relative position of a lookup value in a one-dimensional range.
RiskMgmtExample: Locate a dummy bucket position before returning a control value with INDEX.
Excel2021Alternative: Excel 2021 supports XMATCH. MATCH is acceptable for older compatibility.

Name: FILTER
Description: Returns rows or columns that satisfy a Boolean include condition.
RiskMgmtExample: Show dummy rows whose status equals BREACH for manual review.
Excel2021Alternative: Excel 2021 supports FILTER. Use PivotTable, helper columns, or SUMIFS for static summaries.

Name: SORT
Description: Sorts a range or array by one or more columns.
RiskMgmtExample: Order dummy exposure rows by severity for manual review.
Excel2021Alternative: Excel 2021 supports SORT. Manual sort or PivotTable is also acceptable.

Name: SORTBY
Description: Sorts an array based on values in one or more corresponding arrays.
RiskMgmtExample: Order dummy risk rows by usage ratio while keeping the full row visible.
Excel2021Alternative: Excel 2021 supports SORTBY. Manual sort or PivotTable is also acceptable.

Name: UNIQUE
Description: Returns unique rows or values from a range.
RiskMgmtExample: List unique dummy risk factors before creating a review checklist.
Excel2021Alternative: Excel 2021 supports UNIQUE. Remove Duplicates or PivotTable is also acceptable.

Name: SEQUENCE
Description: Generates a sequence of numbers.
RiskMgmtExample: Create dummy row numbers for a review worksheet.
Excel2021Alternative: Excel 2021 supports SEQUENCE. Manual fill series is also acceptable.

Name: LET
Description: Assigns names to formula expressions and returns a final calculation.
RiskMgmtExample: Name a dummy usage ratio once and reuse it in a readable threshold formula.
Excel2021Alternative: Excel 2021 supports LET. Helper columns are preferred when reviewers need step-by-step visibility.

Name: SUMIFS
Description: Sums values that satisfy one or more criteria.
RiskMgmtExample: Aggregate dummy exposure by portfolio and risk factor before limit review.
Excel2021Alternative: Excel 2021 supports SUMIFS. PivotTable or SQLAggregation can also be used for reviewed summaries.

Name: COUNTIFS
Description: Counts rows that satisfy one or more criteria.
RiskMgmtExample: Count dummy unresolved exceptions by status and owner.
Excel2021Alternative: Excel 2021 supports COUNTIFS. PivotTable can also be used for reviewed counts.

Name: AVERAGEIFS
Description: Averages values that satisfy one or more criteria.
RiskMgmtExample: Average dummy usage ratios by portfolio and risk factor before manual review.
Excel2021Alternative: Excel 2021 supports AVERAGEIFS. PivotTable can also be used for reviewed averages.

Name: MAXIFS
Description: Returns the maximum value among rows that satisfy criteria.
RiskMgmtExample: Find the largest dummy usage ratio for a portfolio during review.
Excel2021Alternative: Excel 2021 supports MAXIFS. PivotTable or helper columns can also be used for reviewed maxima.

Name: MINIFS
Description: Returns the minimum value among rows that satisfy criteria.
RiskMgmtExample: Find the smallest dummy remaining-limit value for a portfolio during review.
Excel2021Alternative: Excel 2021 supports MINIFS. PivotTable or helper columns can also be used for reviewed minima.

Name: SUMPRODUCT
Description: Multiplies arrays and sums the products for weighted calculations.
RiskMgmtExample: Calculate a dummy weighted exposure measure without hidden array spilling.
Excel2021Alternative: Excel 2021 supports SUMPRODUCT. Keep ranges bounded and reviewable.

Name: IFERROR
Description: Returns a fallback value when a formula evaluates to an error.
RiskMgmtExample: Show a review marker when a dummy lookup fails instead of hiding the issue.
Excel2021Alternative: Excel 2021 supports IFERROR. Use review-visible fallback labels rather than blanking exceptions.

Name: INDEX
Description: Returns a value at a row and column position in a range.
RiskMgmtExample: Return a dummy threshold after MATCH identifies the row position.
Excel2021Alternative: Excel 2021 supports INDEX. Pair with MATCH for broad compatibility.

Name: MATCH
Description: Returns the relative position of a value in a range.
RiskMgmtExample: Find the dummy control row used by an INDEX formula.
Excel2021Alternative: Excel 2021 supports MATCH. Pair with INDEX for broad compatibility.

Name: VSTACK
Description: Stacks arrays vertically. This is not in the Excel 2021 compatibility set used by this app.
RiskMgmtExample: Combining dummy exception tables should be reviewed through Excel 2021-compatible steps.
Excel2021Alternative: Use Power Query outside this app, helper sheets, PivotTable, or reviewed SQLAggregation instead of VSTACK.

Name: HSTACK
Description: Stacks arrays horizontally. This is not in the Excel 2021 compatibility set used by this app.
RiskMgmtExample: Combining dummy comparison columns should stay explicit with helper columns.
Excel2021Alternative: Use helper columns, INDEX/MATCH, or reviewed joins outside the workbook instead of HSTACK.

Name: TEXTSPLIT
Description: Splits text into columns or rows. This is not in the Excel 2021 compatibility set used by this app.
RiskMgmtExample: Parsing dummy composite keys should be done with visible helper columns.
Excel2021Alternative: Use Text to Columns, LEFT/MID/RIGHT helper columns, or reviewed upstream parsing instead of TEXTSPLIT.

Name: GROUPBY
Description: Groups rows and aggregates values. This is not in the Excel 2021 compatibility set used by this app.
RiskMgmtExample: Dummy exposure grouping should use reviewable Excel 2021 summaries.
Excel2021Alternative: Use SUMIFS, COUNTIFS, PivotTable, or reviewed SQLAggregation instead of GROUPBY.

Name: PIVOTBY
Description: Creates a dynamic pivot-style summary. This is not in the Excel 2021 compatibility set used by this app.
RiskMgmtExample: Dummy portfolio summaries should use standard PivotTable or static formulas.
Excel2021Alternative: Use PivotTable, SUMIFS, COUNTIFS, or reviewed SQLAggregation instead of PIVOTBY.

Name: MAP
Description: Maps a LAMBDA over array values. This is not in the Excel 2021 compatibility set used by this app.
RiskMgmtExample: Dummy row-by-row risk labels should stay visible with helper columns.
Excel2021Alternative: Use helper columns or LET with standard formulas instead of MAP.

Name: REDUCE
Description: Reduces an array to an accumulated result. This is not in the Excel 2021 compatibility set used by this app.
RiskMgmtExample: Dummy aggregation should use explicit SUMIFS or reviewed SQLAggregation.
Excel2021Alternative: Use SUMIFS, COUNTIFS, PivotTable, or reviewed SQLAggregation instead of REDUCE.

Name: BYROW
Description: Applies a LAMBDA to each row. This is not in the Excel 2021 compatibility set used by this app.
RiskMgmtExample: Dummy row checks should remain visible as helper columns.
Excel2021Alternative: Use helper columns with standard formulas instead of BYROW.

Name: BYCOL
Description: Applies a LAMBDA to each column. This is not in the Excel 2021 compatibility set used by this app.
RiskMgmtExample: Dummy column checks should remain visible as helper rows or reviewed summaries.
Excel2021Alternative: Use helper rows, SUMIFS, or reviewed SQLAggregation instead of BYCOL.

Name: TAKE
Description: Returns rows or columns from the start or end of an array. This is not in the Excel 2021 compatibility set used by this app.
RiskMgmtExample: Dummy top-row review should be done with visible filters or SORT.
Excel2021Alternative: Use filters, SORT, helper rank columns, or PivotTable instead of TAKE.

Name: DROP
Description: Drops rows or columns from an array. This is not in the Excel 2021 compatibility set used by this app.
RiskMgmtExample: Dummy header or exception removal should stay explicit through filters.
Excel2021Alternative: Use filters, explicit ranges, or helper columns instead of DROP.

Name: CHOOSECOLS
Description: Returns selected columns from an array. This is not in the Excel 2021 compatibility set used by this app.
RiskMgmtExample: Dummy report column selection should use explicit ranges or reviewed exports.
Excel2021Alternative: Use explicit ranges, INDEX, or reviewed report generation instead of CHOOSECOLS.

Name: TOCOL
Description: Converts an array to one column. This is not in the Excel 2021 compatibility set used by this app.
RiskMgmtExample: Dummy matrix flattening should be prepared through reviewed data steps.
Excel2021Alternative: Use helper columns or reviewed upstream reshaping instead of TOCOL.

Name: TOROW
Description: Converts an array to one row. This is not in the Excel 2021 compatibility set used by this app.
RiskMgmtExample: Dummy matrix flattening should be prepared through reviewed data steps.
Excel2021Alternative: Use helper rows or reviewed upstream reshaping instead of TOROW.

Name: TEXTBEFORE
Description: Returns text before a delimiter. This is not in the Excel 2021 compatibility set used by this app.
RiskMgmtExample: Dummy composite-key parsing should be visible and reviewable.
Excel2021Alternative: Use LEFT/FIND helper columns or reviewed upstream parsing instead of TEXTBEFORE.

Name: TEXTAFTER
Description: Returns text after a delimiter. This is not in the Excel 2021 compatibility set used by this app.
RiskMgmtExample: Dummy composite-key parsing should be visible and reviewable.
Excel2021Alternative: Use MID/FIND helper columns or reviewed upstream parsing instead of TEXTAFTER.

Name: REGEXTEST
Description: Tests text with a regular expression. This is not in the Excel 2021 compatibility set used by this app.
RiskMgmtExample: Dummy pattern checks should be handled by the app checker or reviewed preprocessing.
Excel2021Alternative: Use helper columns with SEARCH/ISNUMBER or reviewed preprocessing instead of REGEXTEST.

Name: REGEXEXTRACT
Description: Extracts regex matches from text. This is not in the Excel 2021 compatibility set used by this app.
RiskMgmtExample: Dummy key extraction should be handled by reviewed preprocessing.
Excel2021Alternative: Use LEFT/MID/RIGHT/FIND helper columns or reviewed preprocessing instead of REGEXEXTRACT.

Name: REGEXREPLACE
Description: Replaces regex matches in text. This is not in the Excel 2021 compatibility set used by this app.
RiskMgmtExample: Dummy normalization should be handled by reviewed preprocessing.
Excel2021Alternative: Use SUBSTITUTE helper formulas or reviewed preprocessing instead of REGEXREPLACE.
